---
title: "predicting_ck_measurement"
author: "Matthew Davis"
date: "2022-10-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


# Create tibble
```{r}
data <- tribble(
  ~measurement, ~ck_level,
  1, 52000,
  2, 112000,
  3, 47000,
  4, 26000,
  5, 39000,
  6, 31000,
  7, 23000,
  8, 8000,
  9, 9000
)
data
```

# plot
```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = measurement, y = ck_level)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```
